name: Orca Security
description: Monitor Orca Security cloud security posture management for vulnerability and compliance findings

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Orca Security
2. Go to Settings > API Tokens
3. Create a new token with read access
4. Select your region:
   - US: app.us.orcasecurity.io
   - EU: app.eu.orcasecurity.io
5. Enter the token and region host

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Orca Security Settings > API Tokens

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Orca Security is actively scanning and checks for critical alerts

checks.name: Asset Inventory
checks.description: Verifies Orca Security has visibility into cloud assets
